name: Montego Karoo Wet Puppy Lamb – 380g
shortDescription: Karoo offers a super‑premium limited‑ingredient wet diet specially formulated for puppies and adult dogs. Made with fresh meat , it’s free from corn, soya, and gluten. This complete & balanced recipe delivers vital vitamins and minerals alongside a low‑carb formula (using only rice) and prebiotic fibre (beet pulp) to support digestion. 0% Corn: 0% Soya: 0% Gluten – ideal for dogs with food sensitivities
description: Super‑premium Limited Ingredient Diet designed for dogs with sensitive digestion. Karoo wet food is crafted from the finest ingredients to deliver exceptional flavour and nutrition. Key Features Fresh Meat – only the highest quality protein sources Ready‑to‑Serve Meal – no prep needed 0% Corn · 0% Soya · 0% Gluten – ideal for dogs with food sensitivities Complete & balanced – formulated for all life stages (puppy, adult) Veterinarian Recommended – trusted by professionals Nutritional Highlights Limited Ingredient Recipe – minimal, carefully selected components Low Carbohydrate Formula (Rice only) – a single, easily digestible grain to fuel sustained energy Prebiotic Fibre (Beet Pulp) – supports gut health and aids digestion Vitamins & Minerals – balanced nutrients for overall wellness Puppy Feeding Guide Age Weight (kg) Tubs/Day Grams/Day (Tubs only) Mixed Feeding (Kibble + Tubs) Weaning – 2 mo Toy–Small 1–10 ¼ – ⅔ 80 – 265g 40g dry + ¼ tub Medium 10–25 ⅔ – 1¼ 265 – 425g 140g dry + ¾ tub Large / Giant 25+ 1¼ – 1½+ 425 – 570g+ 195g dry + 1 tub+ 4 – 6 mo Toy–Small ½ – ¾ 180 – 325g 100g dry + ⅓ tub Medium ¾ – 1⅓ 325 – 500g 175g dry + ½ tub Large / Giant 1⅓ – 2¼+ 500 – 845g+ 325g dry + 1½ tubs+ 6 – 12 mo Toy–Small ⅓ – ⅔ 125 – 240g 105g dry + ½ tub Medium ⅔ – 1 240 – 450g 225g dry + ¾ tub Large / Giant 1 – 1¾+ 450 – 675g+ 295g dry + 1½ tubs+ Ingredients Puppy Formula: Water, lamb (incl. liver), butternut, rice (incl. rice flour), palm oil, whole egg powder, beet pulp, sodium tripolyphosphate, calcium carbonate, guar gum, salt, xanthan gum, potassium chloride, essential minerals & vitamins. Adult (Ostrich Stew) Formula: Water, ostrich (incl. liver), rice (incl. rice flour), potato, carrots, whole egg powder, palm oil, beet pulp, sodium tripolyphosphate, calcium carbonate, guar gum, salt, xanthan gum, potassium chloride, essential minerals & vitamins. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein: 7.5% Moisture: 82% Total Fat: 6% Crude Fibre: 1% Crude Ash: 2% Calcium: 0.25% Phosphorus: 0.17% Taurine: 135 mg/kg Metabolizable Energy: 76 kcal / 100 g Micronutrients per kg: Vitamin A 1,500 IU · Vitamin D₃ 75 IU · Vitamin E 6 IU · Potassium Chloride 1 g · Zinc Sulphate 7.5 mg · Ferrous Sulphate 7.5 mg · Copper Sulphate 0.5 mg · Manganese Sulphate 0.3 mg · Potassium Iodide 0.1 mg · Sodium Selenite 0.01 mg Preservatives: Approved antioxidants Sensory Enhancers: Gravy sauce, meat‑based palatability enhancers, dextrose
